description: Register a FacebookAdsResource wrapping the Facebook Business SDK for use by other components

resource_key.label: Resource Key
resource_key.description: Key used to register this resource. Other components reference it via resource_key.

app_id_env_var.label: App ID Env Var
app_id_env_var.description: Env var holding Facebook App ID

app_secret_env_var.label: App Secret Env Var
app_secret_env_var.description: Env var holding Facebook App Secret

access_token_env_var.label: Access Token Env Var
access_token_env_var.description: Env var holding long-lived access token
